text_qpc_hafs: وَٱجۡعَل لِّي لِسَانَ صِدۡقٖ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ ٨٤
text_uthmani: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

translations.text: give me a good name among later generations;
make me one of those given the Garden of Bliss-

text_qpc_hafs: وَٱغۡفِرۡ لِأَبِيٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ ٨٦
text_uthmani: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

translations.text: forgive my father, for he is one of those who have gone astray-
and do not disgrace me on the Day when all people are resurrected:

text_qpc_hafs: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٞ وَلَا بَنُونَ ٨٨
text_uthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ

translations.text: the Day when neither wealth nor children can help,

text_qpc_hafs: إِلَّا مَنۡ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلۡبٖ سَلِيمٖ ٨٩
text_uthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ

translations.text: when the only one who will be saved is the one who comes before God with a heart devoted to Him.’
When the Garden is brought near to the righteous
and the Fire is placed in full view of the misguided,

text_qpc_hafs: وَقِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ ٩٢
text_uthmani: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ

translations.text: it will be said to them, ‘Where are those you worshipped

text_qpc_hafs: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلۡ يَنصُرُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ يَنتَصِرُونَ ٩٣
text_uthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ

translations.text: beside God? Can they help you now, or even help themselves?’
and then they will all be hurled into Hell, together with those that misled them,
and all Iblis’s supporters.
There they will say to their gods, as they bicker among themselves,

text_qpc_hafs: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ ٩٧
text_uthmani: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

translations.text: ‘We were clearly misguided
when we made you equal with the Lord of the Worlds.
It was the evildoers who led us astray,
and now we have no intercessor
and no true friend.

text_qpc_hafs: فَلَوۡ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةٗ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ ١٠٢
text_uthmani: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translations.text: If only we could live our lives again, we would be true believers!’

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ ١٠٣
text_uthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

translations.text: There truly is a sign in this, though most of them do not believe:
your Lord alone is the Almighty, the Merciful.
The people of Noah, too, called the messengers liars.

text_qpc_hafs: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ ١٠٦
text_uthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

translations.text: Their brother Noah said to them, ‘Will you not be mindful of God?
I am a faithful messenger sent to you:
be mindful of God and obey me.

text_qpc_hafs: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ ١٠٩
text_uthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

translations.text: I ask no reward of you, for my only reward is with the Lord of the Worlds:
be mindful of God and obey me.’
They answered, ‘Why should we believe you when the worst sort of people follow you?’
